title: stelis alboviolacea
intro: Stelis alboviolacea is a type of orchid species, specifically a small, terrestrial orchid native to Mexico and Central America. The medicinal properties of Stelis alboviolacea include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and even aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions. Stelis alboviolacea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential.
